bands.self_reflection_prompt: Compare what you have noticed in yourself with what your teacher or family has noticed. Where do these accounts agree, and where do they differ?

observable_behaviours: The student challenges discriminatory language or behaviour directed at others

bands.self_reflection_prompt: Analyse a pattern you can see in yourself across two or more different settings this term. What changes across settings, and why do you think it changes?
